title: Plan to Disarm Hamas in Gaza Is Detailed at U.N.
summary_full: A Board of Peace member said the most dangerous weapons would be collected first. He linked compliance with disarmament to reconstruction beginning in the enclave.
summary_public: A Board of Peace member said the most dangerous weapons would be collected first. He linked compliance with disarmament to reconstruction beginning in the enclave.

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: Plan to Disarm Hamas in Gaza Is Detailed at U.N.
